empty.heading: No brief generated yet
empty.body: Use AI to create a structured brief from this demand's data.

errors.streamFailed: Brief generation was interrupted. Please try again.

chat.newConversationConfirm: Are you sure? Start new conversation

empty.heading: Chat with AI about this demand
empty.body: AI already has access to this demand's metadata, files and comments. Ask a question to get started.

chat.compactedBanner: This conversation is getting long. Older messages have been summarized.

errors.streamFailed: Response was interrupted. Please send your message again.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests in a row. Wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.serviceUnavailable: AI service unavailable. Contact your administrator.

planning.title: Monthly planning
planning.redesignPlaceholder: Describe what you want to change (tone, angle, format…)
planning.redesignEmpty: Describe what you want to change before applying.
planning.costConfirmBody: This will generate {{count}} content suggestions for the selected month.
planning.noQuotaWarning: Configure the client's monthly plan to generate planning.
planning.convertError: Could not convert this item to a demand. Please try again.

noClientSelected.heading: Select a client to view their planning
noClientSelected.body: Planning is generated per client and month. Use the filter above.

noPlans.heading: No planning for {{clientName}} yet
noPlans.body: Generate a monthly plan and AI will suggest content to fill the client's quota.

noQuota.heading: Configure this client's monthly plan
noQuota.body: Go to Clients, edit "{{clientName}}" and set "Posts per month" to generate planning.

clients.title: Clients
clients.emptyHint: Add your first client to get started
clients.name: Name
clients.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this client?

monthlyPlan.sectionSubtitle: Configure the monthly quota to generate AI-powered planning. Optional.
monthlyPlan.monthlyPostsHint: Total content pieces to be planned per month.
monthlyPlan.notesHint: Free-form field. AI will consider this distribution when generating the plan.
monthlyPlan.planningDayHint: Day of the month when you usually do planning. A reminder will appear on the dashboard one day before.
monthlyPlan.knowWithAi: 🤖 Get to know this client with AI
monthlyPlan.knowWithAiDisabledTooltip: Configure your Anthropic key in Settings → AI to enable automatic research.
monthlyPlan.knowWithAiStarted: Research started. Follow along on the client card.

research.confirmBody: This research will run for {{minutes}} minutes and use your Anthropic key (BYOK).

ai.title: AI Configuration
ai.description: Each organization uses its own Anthropic key (BYOK). No key is shared between organizations.
ai.keyHint: The key starts with sk-ant-. Stored encrypted; only the last 4 characters are visible afterwards.
ai.testThrottled: Too many attempts in a row. Wait 1 minute.
ai.maUnavailableBanner: Managed Agents is not enabled on this Anthropic account. Chat, Brief and Planning continue to work; automatic client research (🤖 Get to know this client with AI) will be disabled.

managedAgents.title: Research Agent (Managed Agents)
managedAgents.hint: Paste the agent ID created in the Anthropic console (console.anthropic.com → Agents). With the Agent ID configured, the "Know this client with AI" feature will be enabled.
managedAgents.agentIdHint: Find it at console.anthropic.com → Agents → select your agent → copy the ID (starts with agt_)

demands.title: Demands
demands.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this demand?
